input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.3.5.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.3.5.1
            TITLE: alternative materials may be used for applications shown as permitted in f.3.2.1

            CONTENT:
            rule F.3.5.1: Alternative Materials may be used for applications shown as permitted in F.3.2.1
F.3.5.1 Alternative Materials may be used for applications shown as permitted in F.3.2.1

final_answer: Alternative Materials may be used for applications shown as permitted in F.3.2.1
